title: The Rebellion Regroups After Udon
description: On pages 2–5, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Zoro, Kawamatsu, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4 as After Udon’s fall, the alliance regroups, hidden allies surface, and the Kozuki rebellion becomes more concrete.
scene: After Udon’s fall, the alliance regroups, hidden allies surface, and the Kozuki rebellion becomes more concrete.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: WHAT DO YOU intend on doing

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: With all the weapons you've stolen from Passers-by?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Don't throw away your life over a single sword.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Your shusui is a stolen treasure of Wano!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The day that sword left this land is the day misfortune arrived!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That loss incited the anger of the sword God! defeat came to every village!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Eventually, our whole country was overrun!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Are a Samurai and a monk fighting out here in the wilderness?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Neither of you wishes to kill the other! How doll.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: They'll be at it through the night! This island won't last!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: D'ya really think we should evacuate to the main- land?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: WHAT KIND OF IDIOT WOULD RUN AWAY WHEN HIS BOSS IS IN A FIGHT!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: More im- portantly, has there been any word from Udon?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We still can't get through to the Smails.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I see. I think I'll go check on things then.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You're just trying to get away from here, Lord Queen!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What do you mean?! I'll be back, I promise!

summary: This section advances the Wano - Rebellion Regroups storyline with 40 dialogue beats. After Udon’s fall, the alliance regroups, hidden allies surface, and the Kozuki rebellion becomes more concrete.
